name: iteration cap (count=5 >= CAP=5) triggers escalation without incrementing counter
description: Verifies tryAdvanceForLoopBack Path B semantics: when iteration_count equals ITERATION_CAP (5), the function escalates instead of incrementing. Checks: cap_exceeded=true, iteration_count stays at 5 (NOT 6), escalation artifact written at v1.1.0 path, ESCALATE audit row present, final state=ESCALATED. Authority: DECISION-20260513-1500 §2 (Path B binding).
